name: 40 MG Atorvastatin Tablets IP
about: Atorvastatin Tablets IP 40 mg are a general medicine used to treat high cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of heart disease. The tablets are formulated in India and come in a box of 10x3x10 tablets. The recommended dosage of the medicine is as per the doctors suggestion. These tablets are to be stored in a dry and cool place. They are available in the form of tablets and are suitable for adults. Atorvastatin Tablets IP 40 mg work by blocking the enzyme responsible for creating cholesterol in the liver, leading to a decrease in cholesterol levels in the blood.

faq.a: Atorvastatin Tablets IP 40 mg is used to treat high cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of heart disease.

faq.a: Atorvastatin Tablets IP 40 mg should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.a: The recommended dosage of Atorvastatin Tablets IP 40 mg is as per the doctors suggestion.
